task_completion.description: Verify the Site Title is set to 'Artisan Crafts Studio'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress General Settings page, the 'Site Title' input field contains exactly 'Artisan Crafts Studio'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Tagline is set to 'Handcrafted with Love'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress General Settings page, the 'Tagline' input field contains exactly 'Handcrafted with Love'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Timezone is set to 'New York'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress General Settings page, the 'Timezone' dropdown menu is set to 'New York' (or America/New_York).

task_completion.description: Verify a page titled 'Home' has been created
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress Pages list or Page Editor, a page with the title 'Home' is visible and published.

task_completion.description: Verify a page titled 'News' has been created
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress Pages list or Page Editor, a page with the title 'News' is visible and published.

task_completion.description: Verify the site is configured to display a static page
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress Reading Settings page, the 'Your homepage displays' radio button is set to 'A static page'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Home' is selected as the Homepage and 'News' is selected as the Posts page
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress Reading Settings page, the 'Homepage' dropdown is set to 'Home' and the 'Posts page' dropdown is set to 'News'.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress admin dashboard GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual WordPress admin interface (Settings > General, Pages, Settings > Reading) being used, rather than terminal commands or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the settings and published the pages
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success messages like 'Settings saved' or 'Page published' in the WordPress admin dashboard, indicating the changes were committed and not just typed into the fields.

integrity.description: The agent did not write the expected values into a text file or script
integrity.visual_evidence: The values are entered into the actual WordPress input fields and dropdowns, not a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Site Title must be exactly 'Artisan Crafts Studio'. Tagline must be exactly 'Handcrafted with Love'. Timezone must be 'New York' (America/New_York). Two pages must be created: 'Home' and 'News'. The reading settings must be configured to show a static front page (show_on_front='page') with 'Home' as the homepage and 'News' as the posts page.
